name: aurora-copy-button
title: Aurora CopyButton
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
docs:
Aurora CopyButton is an Aurora UI component for Claude Design parity surfaces.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`, and `aurora-clipboard` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/copy-button.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`, `aurora-clipboard`.
